title: Addis ComfiGrip Dustpan and Brush with Rubber Lip and Dirt-trapping Bristles, Metallic Graphite, 11 x 23 x 35 cm
features: ComfiGrip Handle - Comfort When You Clean
Deep Dustpan To Hold A Larger Capacity Of Dirt
Rubber Lip On Pan To Ensure No Dirt Gets Left Behind
Stiff Bristles For Accessing Those Niche Areas
From A Brand That Has Been A Part Of The Home Since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Rubber Lip Feature This ComfiGrip dustpan and brush set features a rubber lip which allows you to easily sweep up any dirt - ensuring none of the residue is left behind. Clips Together The brush and pan set clips together to ensure easy storage and they have a hook feature on the end if you did want to hang them up on the hook. Hardwearing This ComfiGrip set is made from durable, BPA free plastic which is perfect for all your sweeping up needs.
